title: Tao Te Ching 36
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 36 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 36 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: If you want to shrink something, you must first allow it to expand. If you want to weaken something, you must first allow it to grow strong.
